title: Optimization and validation of a PMA qPCR method for Escherichia coli quantification in primary production
author: Truchado, Pilar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article is a postprint of a paper published in the Food Control. Truchado, P., Gil, M. I., Kostic, T., & Allende, A. (2016).
